opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I completely lost my voice this afternoon, and this tickle in my throat makes me cough until I retch.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My voice went completely over a few hours and the coughing fits are exhausting — I want to make sure it's nothing serious.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 days ago with a runny nose and tiredness
symptom_narrative.duration: voice loss over the last several hours
symptom_narrative.character: dry scratchy throat, tickling in the voice box, dry cough
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: voice completely gone, coughing fits make me gag
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: cough comes in fits, worse with talking
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting my voice helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to talk or clear my throat
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a bit of pain swallowing from all the throat clearing; no trouble breathing
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get a bit hoarse with colds sometimes but never lost it completely

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: no essential voice demands for the next couple of days

objective_data_offered.value: can only manage a forced painful whisper on video
breathing feels fine, no noisy breathing
